title: Allruyee 38pcs Christmas Bags Drawstring Gift Wrapping Bags Assorted Sizes Small Medium Large Jumbo Xmas Goody Goody Treat Bag with Tags for Party Favors Present Wrapping
features: 10-Second Gift Wrapping: Experience effortless gift wrapping with our updated Christmas bags featuring a convenient drawstring closure. Just drop in your gift, slide the tag through the ribbon, pull, tie a bow, and you're done—no scissors or tape needed!

Assorted Sizes: Assorted Sizes:Allruyee Christmas drawstring bag set includes 38 cute gift bags in various sizes—6 jumbo（17*24in）, 4 large（15*20in）, 8 medium（12*17in）, and 20 small（9*13in）—across 14 festive patterns, perfect for all your gifting needs this holiday season.Check the pictures for detailed sizing and patterns.
Premium Material: Crafted from durable polyethylene and aluminum foil, these Christmas drawstring bags are reusable and designed to hold a good weight without the worry of breaking.

Come with Gift Tags: Each Allruyee Christmas gift bag includes delightful gift tags, perfect for personalizing your gifts with a message or the recipient's name. This thoughtful touch elevates your presentation and shows you care.

Versatile and Practical: Allruyee Christmas drawstring gift bags are perfect for wrapping gifts of all shapes and sizes, from toys and candies to decorations. They add an element of surprise for Christmas celebrations and offer convenient storage solutions for your home, school, and office this holiday season!
description: Product Description 5 Size 14 Different Christmas Patterns,38 Pcs Christmas Drawstring in Total Jumbo：60cm*44cm (4PCS) Extra Large：42cm*55cm (2PCS) Large：39cm*51cm (4PCS) Medium：43cm*29cm (8PCS) Small: 24cm*32cm ( 20PCS) Each Christmas bag comes with its own exclusive tag, perfectly matching in color and style. No need to bother choosing tags - even beginners can instantly become packaging experts!
